title: [Bug]: podman machine with centos7 image on Mac M1 is not starting
body:
### Issue Description

Podman machine with centos7 image on Mac M1 is not starting and goes to a hung state. 

Architecture : aarch64



### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create a machine `podman machine init --image-path https://cloud.centos.org/centos/7/images/CentOS-7-aarch64-GenericCloud.qcow2.xz centos7`
2. Start the machine  `podman machine start centos7`




### Describe the results you received

The output will be similar to 
```
Starting machine "centos7"
Waiting for VM ...
```
and no progress afterwards


### Describe the results you expected

The machine should be up and running

### podman info output

```shell
podman info
Error: failed to connect: dial tcp [::1]:62023: connect: connection refused
```



### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

```
(base) ➜  ~ podman machine info
Host:
  Arch: arm64
  CurrentMachine: centos7
  DefaultMachine: podman-machine-default
  EventsDir: <REDACTED>
  MachineConfigDir: <REDACTED>
  MachineImageDir: <REDACTED>
  MachineState: Starting
  NumberOfMachines: 2
  OS: darwin
  VMType: qemu
Version:
  APIVersion: 4.3.1
  Built: 1668026638
  BuiltTime: Thu Nov 10 02:13:58 2022
  GitCommit: ""
  GoVersion: go1.18.8
  Os: darwin
  OsArch: darwin/arm64
  Version: 4.3.1
```

### Additional information

```
Arch: aarch64 (arm64)
Machine image: https://cloud.centos.org/centos/7/images/CentOS-7-aarch64-GenericCloud.qcow2.xz 
```

comments.body:
You cannot just use any image, podman machine use fedora CoreOS by default.
AFAIK we depend on ignition support at least and likely other runtime dependecies, i.e. a recent podman must be installed in that image.


That should properly be made clear in the man page for this option. @baude @ashley-cui

it is made clear in other places but the suggestion is still appropriate.  @pkvprakash we do not support just any image running as a machine vm.  it must be prepared in a way that meets all the requirements needed by machine, like ignition, socket mapping, size requirements, etc.  Moreover, the podman versions in centos are too old to be used in conjunction with podman machine.
"Any customer can have a car painted any colour that he wants, so long as it is black."
